title: Polymorph Introduction
summary: Polymorph is my own project within the smart, decentralized media space. The project is now concrete enough that I was able to write an introduction to what Polymorph is, and explain the bigger picture of what it will do and how it will work.
content:
Polymorph is my own project within the smart, decentralized media space. The project is now
                concrete enough that I was able to write an introduction to what Polymorph is, and explain the bigger picture
                of what it will do and how it will work.
